parameters.query:
=SELECT dh.id, dh.deal_id, dh.deal_stage, dh.scored_at, dh.next_step, dh.next_step_date,
  dh.inferred_workstreams, dh.delivery_staff_on_call,
  dh.key_objectives_strategic, dh.key_objectives_security, dh.key_objectives_compliance,
  dh.champion_name, dh.pes_name, dh.executive_sponsor_name,
  dh.p2v2c2_total, dh.critical_activity_stage,
  d.company_name, d.hold_until, d.hold_reason
FROM deal_health dh
JOIN deals d ON d.deal_id = dh.deal_id
WHERE dh.deal_id = '{{ $json.deal_id }}'
ORDER BY dh.scored_at DESC
LIMIT 1

=SELECT
  ad.id AS ad_id, ad.pricing_requested, ad.pricing_requested_at, ad.pricing_contact,
  ad.dc_principal_name, ad.dc_consultant_name, ad.dc_assigned_at, ad.ad_version, ad.ad_presented_at,
  -- Count pending drafts by type to avoid re-queuing
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ol.output_type = 'pricing_request' AND ol.status = 'draft' THEN 1 END) AS draft_pricing_request,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ol.output_type = 'internal_team_update' AND ol.status = 'draft' THEN 1 END) AS draft_internal_update,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ol.output_type = 'pre_call_planner' AND ol.status = 'draft' THEN 1 END) AS draft_pre_call_planner,
  -- Workstreams
  COALESCE(
    JSON_AGG(
      JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
        'service_slug', dw.service_slug,
        'confidence', dw.confidence,
        'scoping_status', dw.scoping_status,
        'pricing_status', dw.pricing_status,
        'dc_assigned_name', dw.dc_assigned_name
      )
    ) FILTER (WHERE dw.id IS NOT NULL),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS workstreams
FROM deals d
LEFT JOIN approach_doc ad ON ad.deal_id = d.deal_id
LEFT JOIN deal_workstreams dw ON dw.deal_id = d.deal_id
LEFT JOIN outputs_log ol ON ol.deal_id = d.deal_id
WHERE d.deal_id = '{{ $('Code: Extract Deal ID').first().json.deal_id }}'
GROUP BY ad.id, ad.pricing_requested, ad.pricing_requested_at, ad.pricing_contact,
  ad.dc_principal_name, ad.dc_consultant_name, ad.dc_assigned_at, ad.ad_version, ad.ad_presented_at

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ deal_id: $json.deal_id, output_type: $json.output_type, recipient_email: $json.recipient_email, recipient_name: $json.recipient_name, instructions: $json.instructions, requested_by: 'ad_tracker', preview_mode: true, triggered_by: 'ad_tracker' }) }}

  COUNT(CASE WHEN ol.output_type = 'pre_call_planner' AND ol.status = 'draft' THEN 1 END) AS draft_pre_call_planner,
  -- Workstreams

        'service_slug', dw.service_slug,
        'confidence', dw.confidence,
